chinese_news.title: 36氪CEO冯大刚：从技术狂欢到价值深水区｜2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AI叙事不再是颠覆一切，真正值得关注的是那些沉默的行业壁垒和经验能否被智能照亮。

 

四年间，这场大会从趋势观察走向落地实践，36氪也从AI的观察者转型为助推者。36氪CEO冯大刚在2026北京亦庄AI+产业大会的开场中，为焦虑的商业世界开出一剂解药，AI不是一家公司的机会，而是千行百业的机会。两天会期、六七十位实操嘉宾、一个让供需双方面对面碰撞的舞台，这里不谈虚的概念，只讲做成了没有。我们记录下这段冷静而笃定的开场白，在技术狂欢中找回商业的常识与本位。

以下为开场演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 9亿次点击背后，AI应用的真实江湖｜2026中国AI应用全景图谱报告
chinese_news.summary:
有一个问题，值得在2026年认真问一次——

你上一次用AI应用，是让它回答了一个问题，还是让它完成了一件事？

这两个动作之间，隔着一个时代。

2026年，AI应用的产品范式，正在从「聊天」走向「做事」。

这不是预言，是已经发生的现实。

从「回答」到「执行」，背后的数据是怎样的？推手是什么？有哪些代表企业？

为了回答这些问题，量子位智库发布2026年中国AI应用全景图谱报告。

报告中，我们通过2026年中国AI应用全景图谱

chinese_news.title: 16款产品入选，2026「焦点」产品计划618特别版重磅发布
独家对谈｜谢文博：银发，孤独，一个中日观察者的十八年
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「职场Bonus」（ID：ZhiChangHongLi）

“上百次往返，看透存量时代的生存法则。”

谢文博，四川人，聊起他从老家到上海再到日本求学的经历，他说喜欢“把自己放在跳起来才够得着的环境里”。

在上海交大材料工程读研二那年，他作为访问学者公派赴日富士施乐做研发。拿到Offer后，三年啃下五篇专利，他发现日本企业有一套"能把普通人管理出好成果"的门道。

2008年，他回国和合伙人一起创办咫尺研学。此后十八年，往返中日上百次，从阿里、京东到万科，他领着各行业的管理者一次次

英伟达：第一财季净利润583亿美元，同比增长211%

36氪获悉，英伟达发布2027财年第一季度财报，财报显示，英伟达第一财季营收816.2亿美元，同比增长85%；净利润583.2亿美元，同比增长211%。

谷歌CEO：Gemini月活跃用户达9亿

谷歌CEO皮查伊在2026年I/O开发者大会上表示，Gemini AI应用的月活跃用户在过去一年中增长了一倍多，达到9亿人次，日请求量增长超过7倍。他补充称，公司目前每月处理超过3.2千兆个AI token，较一年前的4,800万亿增长约7倍，也远高于2024年5月的9.7万亿水平。皮查伊表示，

chinese_news.title: 网易520发布会：质量为先，狙击细分赛道

《遗忘之海》

本次发布会上，《遗忘之海》官宣将于5月22日开启三测前瞻直播，并于28日正式开启测试。 

目前来看，《遗忘之海》应该是网易游戏最受期待的新品之一。它出自《第五人格》开发团队Joker工作室，此前已经推出过两次测试，网易高层也不止一次展现过对这款产

新加坡加码人工智能布局，英伟达将落地本地研发中心

全球AI芯片巨头英伟达将在新加坡新设研发中心，这也是新加坡周三集中公布的一系列人工智能相关举措之一。这座全新实验室是英伟达在新加坡设立的首个研发据点，同时也是其在亚太地区布局的第二处同类研发机构。（新浪财经）

chinese_news.title: 第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京顺利举办！近20位行业大咖解码Agent与非共识机遇
chinese_news.summary:
今日，由量子位主办的第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京启幕。

2026年，AI产业一路高歌猛进。从“龙虾”到“Harness”，爆款Agent接连出圈、风靡全网。面对层出不穷的新业态与新玩法，不少从业者和普通用户都感到困惑：如何找准AI的使用方式？怎样把握产业机遇？又该如何跟上行业发展的步伐？

正是在这一背景下，本届大会以「@所有人，马上AI起来」为主题，集结近20位行业重磅嘉宾，联动产业头部企业、新锐创业公司、顶尖学术力量，围绕AI Agent商业化落地、多模态技术突破、千行百业场景深耕、算力基础设施变革等核心议题，开启了一场深度交流与思想碰撞。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA's revenue decline YoY in any quarter of 2026 due to China market concession?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC, NVIDIA earnings call; Huang statement on China market retreat

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $75,000 on December 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (SpaceX filing, Nvidia earnings); CNBC (Treasury yields, inflation sentiment)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the SEC approve at least one Bitcoin or Ethereum spot ETF by end of Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SEC actively seeking public input on prediction market ETFs and crypto firm master accounts; regulatory thaw narrative gaining traction.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Federal Reserve master accounts proposal, SEC prediction market ETF notice)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ubisoft's stock recover to pre-warning levels (>€80) by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 16% single-day plunge on profit warnings; gaming sector under pressure; investors pricing in extended turnaround or acquisition risk.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will US-Iran negotiations result in a framework agreement by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump signals willingness to wait 'a few days' for Tehran response; geopolitical resolution could shift oil prices and energy sector sentiment.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's market cap exceed Bitcoin's market cap at any point between now and December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko daily snapshots (top-200 markets)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: ETH-to-BTC ratio highly correlated with altseason narratives; Anthropic's GB200 compute expansion (Hacker News signal) may favor ETH-based inference markets; underpriced probability if AI boom accelerates dApp transaction volume.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Anthropic expanding to Colossus2 with GB200; Hyperliquid ETF volume surge (50% jump noted); growing Agent-based smart contract activity in Chinese AIGC sector

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the US Fed cut interest rates by at least 75 basis points cumulatively in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve FOMC decision press releases and rate decision history
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Treasury yields resuming climb amid inflation fears; industrial metals volatility signals potential stagflation scenario that could force Fed pivot earlier than priced into rate futures.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reports: Treasury yields climbing, inflation fears rippling through industrial metals; broad volatile trade in bonds and equities

market_questions_to_create.question: Will AI application user engagement shift from 'question-answering' to 'task-completion' majority by September 30, 2026, per major analyst survey?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: 36Kr/Caixin AIGC industry surveys; ARK Invest AI report; Gartner Magic Quadrant AI applications segment
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese tech media (36Kr) already reporting this inflection point as 'already happening'; English media coverage lags; product paradigm shift from 'chat' to 'execution' is real but underpriced in Western prediction markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr exclusive: 9 billion clicks behind AI applications; shift from 'answering' to 'executing'; Chinese AIGC summit highlighting Agent and agentic framework adoption

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the DXY (US Dollar Index) close the year 2026 below 100?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Federal Reserve DXY official data (FRED)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Putin-Xi Beijing summit signals no major energy deal but reinforces China-Russia alignment; sanctions-resistant trade infrastructure development may pressure dollar if geopolitical de-dollarization accelerates.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC/CNBC: Putin leaves Beijing without pipeline breakthrough but with bilateral agreements; Russia-China shoulder-to-shoulder posture

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana's TVL (total value locked) exceed Ethereum's TVL by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DeFiLlama TVL rankings (Solana vs. Ethereum smart contract chains)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Hyperliquid (trending token) and Sui adoption signal low-cost execution layer dominance; 50% volume jump in Hyperliquid ETFs suggests investor appetite for high-throughput L1s; Chinese AI inference markets increasingly run on Solana-adjacent architectures.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hyperliquid ETF volume surge; Sui trending; Syndicate Labs (rollup) shutdown signals market consolidation toward base-layer solutions

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor capex cycle persists despite China concession; NVDA's 211% YoY net income growth and strong guidance will drive ASML and Taiwan-linked fabs higher through 2027.
supporting_signals: CNBC: NVIDIA Q1 net profit $583B (211% YoY growth), strong outlook
36Kr: NVIDIA establishing Singapore R&D center; enterprise AI demand unabated
CoinDesk: Bitcoin miners tied to AI rise; Nvidia earnings beat signals sustained cloud capex
investment_theses.counter_view: China's Huawei advances and geopolitical tension could trigger tariff escalation or TSMC export restrictions, collapsing semiconductor multiples.
investment_theses.expression: Long SMH (semiconductor ETF) or ASML calls; or long TSM (Taiwan Semiconductor) equity through June 2026

investment_theses.thesis: Inflation data surprises will drive real yields higher; long-duration Treasuries and DXY underperform; BTC and commodities rally as hedge.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Treasury yields resuming climb; inflation fears rippling through industrial metals and bonds
CoinDesk: Binance SpaceX IPO perps at $2T valuation indicate risk-on sentiment despite inflation noise
CoinDesk: Bitcoin miners AI-linked narrative gaining traction; macro uncertainty supports hard asset demand
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed credibility remains intact; real rates already sufficiently compensate for inflation; nominal growth disappoints and bonds rally.
investment_theses.expression: Long TLT (20+ year Treasury ETF) calls + long BTC; or long BTC/DXY ratio; short nominal bond ETF (BND) against long commodity/hard asset position

investment_theses.thesis: China-Russia geopolitical de-dollarization push (Putin-Xi summit, 'shoulder-to-shoulder' rhetoric, energy infrastructure deals) accelerates alternative payment rails; onchain settlement tokens (ETH, stablecoins on Sui/Solana) outperform.
supporting_signals: BBC/CNBC: Putin-Xi Beijing summit reinforces bilateral alignment, 'no pipeline deal but stack of agreements'
36Kr: Chinese AIGC summit highlights Agents, inference markets on alternative L1s
CoinDesk: Federal Reserve proposing master accounts for crypto; regulatory thaw narrative
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical posturing is performative; SWIFT dominance is entrenched; no material shift in cross-border settlement flows occurs.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH, SUI, or governance token (NEX trending) over BTC; or long USDC/stablecoin yields on Solana vs. centralized exchange USD deposits

investment_theses.thesis: AI agent maturation (ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude agentic modes; OpenAI geometry conjecture breakthrough) drives compute capex into 2027; infrastructure stocks (cloud, chips, power) rally; correlated with BTC-miner-AI narrative.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: OpenAI model disproved discrete geometry conjecture; Agent-based reasoning advancing
36Kr: 'From answer to execution' — AI paradigm shift to agentic task completion already underway
CoinDesk: Bitcoin miners tied to AI; Nvidia earnings signal strong momentum; Anthropic expanding Colossus2 with GB200
investment_theses.counter_view: AI capex cycle peaks; diminishing returns on training; power constraints become binding; cloud spend flattens.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA, ASML, or AI infrastructure ETF (CLOU, SKYY); long BTC as compute-demand proxy; or long energy ETF (XLE) if power demand narrative accelerates

investment_theses.thesis: Prediction market ETF approval (SEC actively seeking input) by Q3 2026 will legitimize onchain betting; Polymarket, Kalshi volumes surge; correlated with regulatory clarity on crypto master accounts.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: SEC seeks public comment on prediction market ETFs; Polymarket lists parlays
CoinDesk: Federal Reserve proposes limited master accounts for crypto firms
36Kr: Chinese regulatory shift toward AI application governance; lighter touch on crypto rails
investment_theses.counter_view: SEC stalls ETF approval; lobbying against prediction markets succeeds; traditional finance gatekeepers retain control.
investment_theses.expression: Long REP (Augur), MATIC (prediction market infrastructure); or synthetic bet on Polymarket/Kalshi volume via crypto derivatives ETF if approved; long crypto custodian stocks (Silvergate analog)
